hero.name: Joe Bao
hero.tagline: Focused on building high-performance automation tools, cloud-native architectures, and modern web experiences. Passionate about solving complex engineering challenges—from hardware-level discrepancies to frontend state management.

about.label: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineer currently pursuing a Master of IT at UNSW. I thrive on designing elegant solutions to complex problems—whether it's architecting declarative state machines, optimizing OpenCV image recognition, or reverse-engineering legacy codebases.
about.p2: Beyond coding, I am a core maintainer of MaaEnd, an open-source project with tens of thousands of active users. I strongly believe in 'Convention over Configuration' and 'letting systems manage standards'. In my blog, I write about hard-won engineering lessons, from debugging performance spikes to solving color-space inconsistencies.
about.educationValue: Master of IT @ UNSW / Bachelor of CS @ UQ
about.terminalPassion: Writing reliable systems and clean code

items.title: Core Maintainer & Developer
items.description: Maintain an open-source project with 130,000+ downloads and 1.7k+ stars, earning direct financial sponsorship from the project owner. Architected JSON & Go-based declarative state machine pipelines, combining OpenCV and OCR to significantly improve recognition robustness across varying GPU hardware.

items.title: Master of Information Technology
items.description: Achieved High Distinction (HD) across core courses including Advanced C++ Programming (90), Computer Networks (89), and Database Systems (91).

items.title: Front-End Engineer (Contract)
items.description: Developed frontend modules (Vue.js) for enterprise-level router configuration products. Rapidly reverse-engineered and adapted to complex legacy architectures to diagnose and resolve high-priority rendering bugs, ensuring a zero-regression milestone release.

items.title: Bachelor of Computer Science
items.description: Core focus on Cloud Computing, High-Performance Computing, Compilers & Interpreters, AI, and Software Engineering Processes.

items.title: MaaEnd | Desktop Open-Source Automation Engine
items.description: Flagship project. A computer vision and declarative state machine-based automation tool. Engineered a hybrid HSV color-matching and OCR fallback strategy to resolve RGB offset issues caused by varying GPU drivers, ensuring stability for thousands of users.

items.title: CI/CD Optimization Pipeline
items.description: Custom performance optimization pipeline for MaaEnd. Reduced GitHub Actions template validation time from 10 hours to 5 minutes by implementing a hash-based incremental lossless compression algorithm (oxipng) and Cartesian product testing strategies.

items.title: Pantry Pal | Cloud-Native Smart Pantry
items.description: Full-stack iOS application. Built the frontend with React Native and Context API. Architected the Django and AWS DynamoDB backend using Single-Table Design (PK/SK) and GSIs for optimized querying. Integrated AWS Textract for automated receipt OCR data entry.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.description: I am actively seeking full-time software engineering roles starting late 2026 (currently available for part-time/internships at 48 hrs/fortnight). Whether you have a tough technical challenge to discuss or a matching opportunity, feel free to reach out!
contact.hint: or find me on LinkedIn/GitHub in the navigation bar

footer.description: Building reliable systems with clean code. Convention over Configuration.
footer.builtWith: Designed & built with React + Tailwind CSS

blog.label: Blog
blog.title: Post-mortems & Thoughts
blog.subtitle: Writing about open-source maintenance, debugging deep dives, performance optimization, and my engineering philosophy.
blog.noPosts: No posts yet. Ready to write down those stories about 400ms latency spikes and HSV color spaces?
